1-naive.raw_response:
## FHIR Queries: Cardiorespiratory Fitness Testing

```
Procedure?code=http://snomed.info/sct|76746007&_include=Procedure:patient

Procedure?code=http://snomed.info/sct|447756006&_include=Procedure:patient

Procedure?code=http://snomed.info/sct|164847006&_include=Procedure:patient

DiagnosticReport?code=http://loinc.org|18752-6&_include=DiagnosticReport:patient&_include=DiagnosticReport:result

Observation?code=http://loinc.org|59574-4&_include=Observation:patient

Observation?code=http://loinc.org|55430-6&_include=Observation:patient

Observation?code=http://loinc.org|89270-3&_include=Observation:patient
```

---

### Query Breakdown

| Query | Resource | Code System | Code | Description |
|-------|----------|-------------|------|-------------|
| 1 | `Procedure` | SNOMED CT | `76746007` | Cardiovascular stress test (exercise ECG) |
| 2 | `Procedure` | SNOMED CT | `447756006` | Cardiopulmonary exercise test (CPET) |
| 3 | `Procedure` | SNOMED CT | `164847006` | Standard exercise tolerance test |
| 4 | `DiagnosticReport` | LOINC | `18752-6` | Exercise stress test study report |
| 5 | `Observation` | LOINC | `59574-4` | Maximal oxygen consumption (VO₂ max) |
| 6 | `Observation` | LOINC | `55430-6` | Target peak VO₂ (CPET measurement) |
| 7 | `Observation` | LOINC | `89270-3` | VO₂ max exercise measurement |

### Notes
- `_include=Procedure:patient` / `_include=Observation:patient` returns linked **Patient** resources in the same Bundle
- Queries 5–7 target **VO₂/oxygen consumption** observations specifically associated with CPET
- Query 4 includes `_include=DiagnosticReport:result` to pull associated `Observation` results (e.g., METs achieved, VO₂ max recorded in the report)
- Consider combining results using `_revinclude=Procedure:patient` on `Patient` resources if deduplicating patients across queries
1-naive.prompt_text: Find all patients who have had cardiorespiratory fitness testing performed, including exercise stress tests or cardiopulmonary exercise testing with oxygen consumption measurements.

1-broad.raw_response:
## FHIR Queries: Cardiorespiratory Fitness Testing

These queries span **Procedure**, **DiagnosticReport**, and **Observation** resources to capture exercise stress tests (EST) and cardiopulmonary exercise tests (CPET) with VO₂ measurements.

---

### 🏃 Procedures — Exercise Stress Tests & CPET

```
Procedure?code=http://snomed.info/sct|164847006&_include=Procedure:subject
Procedure?code=http://snomed.info/sct|252510006&_include=Procedure:subject
Procedure?code=http://snomed.info/sct|447346005&_include=Procedure:subject
Procedure?code=http://snomed.info/sct|256966008&_include=Procedure:subject
```

---

### 📋 Diagnostic Reports — Exercise & Cardiopulmonary Testing

```
DiagnosticReport?code=http://loinc.org|18752-6&_include=DiagnosticReport:subject
DiagnosticReport?code=http://loinc.org|59776-5&_include=DiagnosticReport:subject
DiagnosticReport?code=http://loinc.org|19834-1&_include=DiagnosticReport:subject
DiagnosticReport?code=http://loinc.org|60842-2&_include=DiagnosticReport:subject
```

---

### 🔬 Observations — VO₂ & Oxygen Consumption Measurements

```
Observation?code=http://loinc.org|59460-6&_include=Observation:subject
Observation?code=http://loinc.org|55422-2&_include=Observation:subject
Observation?code=http://loinc.org|55426-3&_include=Observation:subject
Observation?code=http://loinc.org|18752-6&_include=Observation:subject
```

---

### 👤 Reverse Lookup — Patients with These Tests

```
Patient?_has:Procedure:subject:code=http://snomed.info/sct|164847006
Patient?_has:Procedure:subject:code=http://snomed.info/sct|252510006
Patient?_has:DiagnosticReport:subject:code=http://loinc.org|18752-6
Patient?_has:DiagnosticReport:subject:code=http://loinc.org|60842-2
Patient?_has:Observation:subject:code=http://loinc.org|59460-6
```

---

### 📌 Code Reference

| Code | System | Description |
|------|--------|-------------|
| `164847006` | SNOMED CT | Exercise tolerance test |
| `252510006` | SNOMED CT | Cardiopulmonary exercise test (CPET) |
| `447346005` | SNOMED CT | Graded exercise ECG stress test |
| `256966008` | SNOMED CT | Exercise test with respiratory gas analysis |
| `18752-6` | LOINC | Exercise stress test study |
| `59776-5` | LOINC | Exercise stress test panel |
| `60842-2` | LOINC | Cardiopulmonary exercise testing panel |
| `59460-6` | LOINC | VO₂ max (mL/min/kg) |
| `55422-2` | LOINC | Oxygen consumption max (VO₂ max) |
| `55426-3` | LOINC | Oxygen consumption (VO₂) |
1-broad.prompt_text: Find all patients who have had cardiorespiratory fitness testing performed, including exercise stress tests or cardiopulmonary exercise testing with oxygen consumption measurements.

1-expert.raw_response:
## FHIR Queries: Cardiorespiratory Fitness Testing

These queries cover **exercise stress tests (EST)** and **cardiopulmonary exercise testing (CPET)** across Procedures, Observations, and DiagnosticReports.

---

### 🏃 Exercise Stress Tests — Procedures (SNOMED)
```
Procedure?code=http://snomed.info/sct|76746007&_include=Procedure:patient
Procedure?code=http://snomed.info/sct|164847006&_include=Procedure:patient
```

### 🫁 Cardiopulmonary Exercise Testing (CPET) — Procedures (SNOMED)
```
Procedure?code=http://snomed.info/sct|249227004&_include=Procedure:patient
```

### 📊 Oxygen Consumption / VO₂ Measurements — Observations (LOINC)
```
Observation?code=http://loinc.org|55283-6&_include=Observation:patient
Observation?code=http://loinc.org|19911-7&_include=Observation:patient
Observation?code=http://loinc.org|74016-3&_include=Observation:patient
```

### 📋 Exercise Stress Test Studies — Observations & Reports (LOINC)
```
Observation?code=http://loinc.org|18752-6&_include=Observation:patient
DiagnosticReport?code=http://loinc.org|18752-6&_include=DiagnosticReport:patient
```

---

### Code Reference

| Resource | System | Code | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| Procedure | SNOMED | `76746007` | Cardiovascular stress testing |
| Procedure | SNOMED | `164847006` | ECG: exercise stress test |
| Procedure | SNOMED | `249227004` | Cardiopulmonary exercise test (CPET) |
| Observation | LOINC | `55283-6` | O₂ consumption [mL/(min·kg)] — peak exercise |
| Observation | LOINC | `19911-7` | O₂ consumption maximum [mL/min] — stress test |
| Observation | LOINC | `74016-3` | VO₂ peak [mL/(min·kg)] |
| Observation / DiagnosticReport | LOINC | `18752-6` | Exercise stress test study |

> **Note:** `_include=ResourceType:patient` retrieves linked Patient resources in the same Bundle. Combine with `_revinclude=Patient:link` if Patient-first traversal is preferred.
1-expert.prompt_text: Find all patients who have had cardiorespiratory fitness testing performed, including exercise stress tests or cardiopulmonary exercise testing with oxygen consumption measurements.

2-expert.raw_response:
I now have a complete picture. Here's a summary of my findings:

---

### Investigation Summary

| Resource | Code System | Code | Display | Count |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `Procedure` | SNOMED CT | `76746007` | Cardiovascular stress testing | **119** |
| `Observation` | LOINC | `18752-6` | Exercise stress test study | 0 |
| `Observation` | LOINC | `96975-8` | Sub-maximal exercise stress test study | 0 |
| `DiagnosticReport` | — | — | (no records) | 0 |

**Key findings:**
- The server holds **119 Procedure resources**, every one coded with SNOMED CT `76746007` — *Cardiovascular stress testing* — which is the parent/umbrella concept covering exercise stress tests (treadmill/bike ECG), cardiopulmonary exercise tests (CPET/VO₂ max), and pharmacologic stress tests.
- More specific CPET codes (`447317009`, `1285442007`, `387715009`) return **0**, confirming the server uses only the parent code.
- No `Observation` or `DiagnosticReport` resources exist on this server.
- VSAC value set *Exercise Stress Test* (OID `2.16.840.1.113762.1.4.1222.969-20240707`) contains LOINC codes `18752-6` and `96975-8`, but these yield no matches either.

---

**FINAL ANSWER:**

```
Procedure?code=http://snomed.info/sct|76746007
```
2-expert.prompt_text: Find all patients who have had cardiorespiratory fitness testing performed, including exercise stress tests or cardiopulmonary exercise testing with oxygen consumption measurements.

3-naive.raw_response:
Here is a summary of everything discovered before the final answer:

---

### Investigation Summary

| Step | Finding |
|---|---|
| **Server sample** | Server uses **SNOMED CT** for Procedure codes; sampled 3 procedures all had `76746007 – Cardiovascular stress testing` |
| **VSAC value set** | "Exercise Stress Test" (OID `2.16.840.1.113762.1.4.1222.969`) contains LOINC `18752-6` (exercise stress test study) and `96975-8` (sub-maximal exercise stress test study) |
| **SNOMED 76746007** | Confirmed valid: *"Cardiovascular stress testing (procedure)"* — umbrella concept covering exercise stress tests AND CPET subtypes (bicycle ergometer, arm ergometer, preoperative CPET) |
| **VO2/oxygen consumption LOINC codes** | LOINC `19088-2`, `19089-0`, `19090-8` (peak VO₂, anaerobic threshold) → **0 Observation hits** on server |
| **LOINC stress test study codes** | LOINC `18752-6`, `96975-8` → **0 Observation / DiagnosticReport hits** |
| **Total Observations on server** | **0** — all cardiorespiratory fitness testing is encoded as `Procedure`, not Observation/DiagnosticReport |
| **Confirmed count** | **119 Procedures** with SNOMED `76746007` = the entire Procedure cohort on this server |

**Conclusion:** SNOMED `76746007` ("Cardiovascular stress testing") is the single umbrella code on this server capturing all cardiorespiratory fitness testing — exercise stress tests, CPET with oxygen consumption, treadmill/ergometer variants, and pharmacologic+exercise stress tests. No separate VO₂/oxygen-consumption Observation resources exist.

---

**FINAL ANSWER:**

```
Procedure?code=http://snomed.info/sct|76746007
```
3-naive.prompt_text: Find all patients who have had cardiorespiratory fitness testing performed, including exercise stress tests or cardiopulmonary exercise testing with oxygen consumption measurements.

3-broad.raw_response:
Here is a summary of the full discovery process before the final answer:

---

### 🔍 Evidence Summary

**Playbooks applied: 6 (Procedurally defined) + 8 (Multi-system code lists)**

| Code | System | Description | Server Hits |
|---|---|---|---|
| `76746007` | SNOMED CT | Cardiovascular stress testing *(umbrella: treadmill, bicycle, ECG, pharmacologic stress tests)* | **119** |
| `447346005` | SNOMED CT | Cardiopulmonary exercise test — CPET with VO2/O2 consumption *(crosswalked from CPT 94621)* | 0 (valid code, no current data) |

**Key findings:**
- ✅ Server uses **SNOMED CT exclusively** on `Procedure` resources
- ✅ `76746007` confirmed as the primary code for all exercise stress test variants (treadmill, bicycle ergometer, ECG monitoring, pharmacologic stress)
- ✅ `447346005` is the correct SNOMED code for CPET/VO2 testing (verified via VSAC lookup + UMLS CPT→SNOMED crosswalk of CPT 94621)
- ✅ `76746007` does **NOT** subsume `447346005` — they are sibling concepts; both must be included
- ❌ No `DiagnosticReport` or `Observation` resources exist on this server (VSAC LOINC codes `18752-6`/`96975-8` not applicable here)
- Combined query yields **119 patients** (all exercise stress test types captured)

---

**FINAL ANSWER:**

```
Procedure?code=http://snomed.info/sct|76746007,http://snomed.info/sct|447346005
```

```

## FHIR Queries: Cardiac Exercise Stress Tests (ECG + Combined Modalities, Excluding Pharmacologic)

### ✅ INCLUDE — Exercise Stress Echocardiography (ECG + Echo, Exercise-Based)

```

> - `269911007` = Cardiopulmonary exercise test; `447346005` = Cardiopulmonary exercise test with ECG; LOINC `55405-6` = Cardiopulmonary stress test panel; LOINC `19811-6` = Maximum O₂ consumption (VO₂ max); `59408-5` = Oxygen saturation — all inherently exercise-based, no pharmacologic exclusion needed.

---

### Pharmacologic Agent Exclusion Safety Net
To explicitly confirm absence of pharmacologic stressor administration during the same encounter, cross-check against:

```
MedicationAdministration?medication=http://www.nlm.nih.gov/research/umls/rxnorm|3407

MedicationAdministration?medication=http://www.nlm.nih.gov/research/umls/rxnorm|1223
```

> - RxNorm `3407` = Adenosine; `3484` = Dipyridamole; `1223` = Dobutamine. Patients appearing in results from Groups 1–3 should **not** appear in these `MedicationAdministration` results during the same encounter context.

1-expert.raw_response:
## FHIR Query Strategy

This requires **inclusion queries** (exercise-based combined stress tests) and **exclusion queries** (pharmacologic stress agent identification for negative matching). Specific exercise-coded procedures inherently exclude pharmacologic variants, but explicit exclusion queries are also provided for systems using broader codes.

---

### ✅ Inclusion Queries — Exercise Combined Stress Tests

**ECG + Echocardiography + Exercise:**
```
Procedure?code=http://snomed.info/sct|433233004
```

**ECG + Nuclear/Radionuclide Cardiac Perfusion Imaging + Exercise:**
```
Procedure?code=http://snomed.info/sct|241541005
```

**ECG + Oxygen Uptake/VO₂ Measurement + Exercise (Cardiopulmonary Exercise Test):**
```
Procedure?code=http://snomed.info/sct|447346005
```

---

### ❌ Exclusion Queries — Pharmacologic Stress Procedures
*(Run these and subtract matching patients from inclusion results)*

**Dobutamine stress echocardiography:**
```
Procedure?code=http://snomed.info/sct|433234010
```

**Adenosine pharmacological stress test:**
```
Procedure?code=http://snomed.info/sct|444810006
```

**Dipyridamole pharmacological stress test:**
```
Procedure?code=http://snomed.info/sct|413226001
```

---

### ❌ Exclusion Queries — Pharmacologic Agent Medication Administration
*(Alternative/supplementary exclusion via administered drugs)*

**Adenosine administration:**
```
MedicationAdministration?medication=http://www.nlm.nih.gov/research/umls/rxnorm|190
```

**Dipyridamole administration:**
```
MedicationAdministration?medication=http://www.nlm.nih.gov/research/umls/rxnorm|3521
```

**Dobutamine administration:**
```
MedicationAdministration?medication=http://www.nlm.nih.gov/research/umls/rxnorm|3498
```

---

### Notes
| Query Set | Code System | Purpose |
|---|---|---|
| Inclusion (1–3) | SNOMED CT | Exercise-specific procedure codes — pharmacologic agents semantically excluded |
| Exclusion (4–6) | SNOMED CT | Pharmacologic stress procedure codes for patient-level subtraction |
| Exclusion (7–9) | RxNorm | Medication-level exclusion for systems recording agents separately from procedure type |

The **MedicationAdministration exclusion** is especially important when facilities code all stress echos under a single broad procedure code and distinguish stress modality only via the administered agent.

## FHIR Queries: Cardiac Stress Test

Cardiac stress tests are documented as **Procedures** and/or **DiagnosticReports**. I'll query both resources using relevant **SNOMED CT** and **LOINC** codes.

---

### 🫀 Procedure Queries (SNOMED CT)
```
Procedure?code=http://snomed.info/sct|76746007
Procedure?code=http://snomed.info/sct|392492000
Procedure?code=http://snomed.info/sct|71061000
```

### 📋 DiagnosticReport Queries (LOINC)
```
DiagnosticReport?code=http://loinc.org|18752-6
DiagnosticReport?code=http://loinc.org|59770-8
```

---

### 📌 Code Reference

| Code System | Code | Display |
|---|---|---|
| SNOMED CT | `76746007` | Cardiovascular stress testing (procedure) |
| SNOMED CT | `392492000` | Exercise stress test (procedure) |
| SNOMED CT | `71061000` | Cardiac stress test (procedure) |
| LOINC | `18752-6` | Exercise stress test study |
| LOINC | `59770-8` | Stress test study (cardiovascular) |

---

### 💡 Notes
- Use **`_include=Procedure:patient`** or **`_include=DiagnosticReport:patient`** to retrieve associated Patient resources in a single request
- To retrieve only **patients**, chain with: `Patient?_has:Procedure:patient:code=http://snomed.info/sct|76746007`
- Some systems may encode these under **CPT 93015** (cardiovascular stress test) — check if your FHIR server supports CPT code searches via `ServiceRequest` or `Procedure`

1-expert.raw_response:
## FHIR Queries — Cardiac Exercise Stress Test (PheKB eMERGE Mayo CRF Algorithm)

### Tier 1 — Exercise-Specific Stress Test Codes (Preferred)

These codes explicitly encode exercise-based protocols and should be prioritized when the data distinguishes exercise from pharmacologic stress testing:

```
Procedure?code=http://snomed.info/sct|164847006
Procedure?code=http://snomed.info/sct|103752002
Procedure?code=http://snomed.info/sct|71388002
Procedure?code=http://snomed.info/sct|433233004
```

### Tier 2 — Broad Cardiovascular Stress Testing (Fallback)

Use when source data does not distinguish protocol type, or as a superset query requiring downstream filtering:

```
Procedure?code=http://snomed.info/sct|76746007
```

### Combined OR Query (Single-Pass Retrieval, Exercise Codes)

```
Procedure?code=http://snomed.info/sct|164847006,http://snomed.info/sct|103752002,http://snomed.info/sct|71388002,http://snomed.info/sct|433233004
```

---

### Code Reference Table

| SNOMED CT Code | Description | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| `164847006` | Standard exercise ECG test | Treadmill/bike ETT; primary CRF algorithm target |
| `103752002` | Exercise tolerance test with ECG | ETT + ECG; core exercise protocol |
| `71388002` | Exercise tolerance test | General exercise tolerance; broader |
| `433233004` | Exercise stress echocardiography | Exercise echo (not dobutamine) |
| `76746007` | Cardiovascular stress testing | General/non-specific; includes pharmacologic — **use as fallback only** |

> ⚠️ **Pharmacologic exclusion:** Dobutamine/adenosine/regadenoson stress protocols (SNOMED `241526001`, `312845000`) should be **excluded** from the CRF cohort if the broader `76746007` fallback query is used.

The cohort of interest had exercise-based (not pharmacologic) stress testing; if the data distinguishes between exercise and pharmacologic protocols, prefer the exercise-based code.
